headline: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Tesla, AMD Loom After AI Stock Sell-Off
summary: Google earnings and capex guidance will be key for battered AI stocks. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also will report.

headline: 9 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today’s Session
summary:
This whale alert can help traders discover the next big trading opportunities.
Whales are entities with large sums of money and we track their transactions here at Benzinga on our options activity scanner.
Traders often
